steps.text: Write the normal temperature range as an inequality: \(97.8 \leq T \leq 99\) (inclusive on both ends).

• Choice A: 97.7°F — \(97.7 < 97.8\), below the lower bound. Incorrect.
  • Choice B: 97.6°F — \(97.6 < 97.8\), below the lower bound. Incorrect.
  • Choice C: 97.9°F — \(97.8 \leq 97.9 \leq 99\), within the normal range. That matches choice C — C is correct.
  • Choice D: 99.7°F — \(99.7 > 99\), above the upper bound. Incorrect.
